panels.description: Both sensors + average. Threshold lines: low trigger and high (stop watering).
panels.title: Soil Moisture

panels.description: Moisture at start vs end of session — gap shows how much watering helped.
panels.title: Moisture Start vs End

panels.description: WHO bands — 0–2 low · 3–5 moderate · 6–7 high · 8–10 very high · 11+ extreme.
panels.title: UV Index (outside, recent)

panels.description: Raw ADC values from the soil sensors.
panels.title: Soil ADC (raw)

panels.description: 50W threshold line distinguishes idle/no-load from active pump (~420W).
panels.title: Pump Wattage

panels.description: Each dot = one check cycle. Green = session started, gray = skipped.
panels.title: Start / Skip Decisions

panels.description: Soil moisture and active threshold recorded at each check.
panels.title: Moisture vs Threshold at Decision Time

panels.description: Rain probability and intensity recorded at each check.
panels.title: Rain at Decision Time

panels.description: How long the valve was open per session.
panels.title: Session Duration
